TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ya-sun-sen, title = Ya-sun-sen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ya-sun-sen} }

S.FORM: == Ya-sun-sen ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ == Ya-sun-sen " Si-pan-ya kamu : Asunci√≥n, ngiha nu Si-pan-ya :(asun'sjon) u Pa-la-kuy tukay, tademaw nu henin 525,252 ku tademaw "tusepcaylim mihcaan" itida i nan-wi 25.2667¬∞, si-cin 57.6667¬∞. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy sawac nu kawili sadipasan, u Pa-la-kuy a angangangan nu minatu atu kakulian, tatelungan nu lalangawan, kakulian angangangan u kakanen a kakakukulian, atu tatatenunan a kakulian atu tatabakuan a kakulian. ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ(Ë•øÁè≠ÁâôË™û:Asunci√≥n,Ë•øÁè≠ÁâôË™ûÁôºÈü≥:(asun'sjon)) . Ya-sun-sen u ce-ce-se', caay kaw nu canan a cuoan. tabakiay a tukayan u Ta-ya-sun-sen han. Ya-sun-sen patidengan i caylimlupic mihcaan walu a bulad caylim demiad, u Nan-mem-cuo satenesay nu likisian a tukayan, si pangangangan han tu Nan-mem-cuo a " wina nu tukay", tadangangan naw Nuestra Se√±ora de la Asunci√≥n "tayda i tapukuan ni Maliya". Caywallimsiw mihcaan namaka Pa-la-kuy kalepacawan nanidebungan nu Pa-si hitay, katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan Pa-si hitay hida satu a taluma' ku nuheni. ",ÂéüÂêçÁÇ∫Nuestra Se√±ora de la Asunci√≥n .1869 . Ing-cung samian u mitudungan tu Pa-li nu hitayan nisaadidian a luma'an, micapiay u tatelungan nu macian, caysiwpicsep mihcaan atu caysiwwalsep mihcaan misaahebal tu W-lu-kua-ya putah, tastaseng ku malumanay a tukay, ayda ya malumanay mapeci' henay, sakatalawan sa tu labii. kapah ku inakaan a luma'an, u siidaay nu Pa-la-kuy ku muenengay, idaw ku tabakiay nu patiyamay, cacakayan. CONMEBOL a hunbu itida i Ya-sun-sen capi nu Lu-ke'. idaw ku nakamuan saan Ya-sun-sen u sakay hekal a kanatalan nu taydaay midang nu sayasuyay a tukayan. .CONMEBOL . Ya-sun-sen itida i Nan-cuy-ti-cun amisan nutipan kapulungan nu iciba ni kalepacawan a kitidaan, milaad tu Ta-si-yeng caylusepsep kun-li, milaad tu Tay-pin-yeng caysepsepsep kun-li. ilabu nu Ya-sun-sen idaw ku sasing nu Cung-hua-min-kuo Cen-cung-cen atu Cen-ce-se dadan. . likisiÊ≠∑Âè≤ kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy "Paraguayan War" singangan tu tulu ka pulungan a kalepacaw " War of the Triple Alliance" , u caywallimsip mihcaan katukuh caywalpicsep mihcaan, Pa-la-kuy atu tuluay a kanatalan " A-ken-ten, Pa-si-ti-kuo atu W-la-kuy" tunikalepacawan. uyni u La-tin-mem-cuo nu sakay likisian u sakalabadesan, u sakatalawan ni kalepacawan, mahiniay a nikalepacawan misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy tadamalibalucu', tadamawada' ku tademaw nu Pa-la-kuy " ini i nikacinglawan nu sulitan, tatengaay a nikapatayan caay ka tinengngi", ina Pa-la-kuy ales han tu nuheni ku A-kin-tin atu Pa-si a lalaan. nina ni kalepacawan kalingatuan i caywalnemsip mihcaan tu hedek, lingatu han namakayda i W-la-kuy sa macalap ku Pa-la-kuy atu Pa-si nikalawlawan. caywalnemlim mihcaan, A-ken-tin atu W-la-kuy micumud misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy a milepacaw, sisa ninakalepacawan pangangan han " tulu a kanatal nikalepacawan". ". kademecan ni kalepacawan tu Pa-la-kuy hatida tu sa. Pa-la-kuy tina kalepacawan hinademec, milihida tu miwawies, uynihan tu u kalabadesan a nikalepacawan, sisa Pa-la-kuy hitay atu binawlan katuud ku mapatayay i nikalepacawan, mapateluh atu imelang aibalucu' han tu. mahiniay a nikalepacawan matulin tu sabaw sepat a bulad, katukuh i caywalpicsep mihcaan tulu a bulad cacay a demiad, Fuo-lan-si-ke.Suo-la-nuo.Luo-pae-se cung-tun itida i Say-luo-kaw-la nikalepacawan patayen nu Pa-si a hitay. A-ken-tin atu Pa-si hitay debungan ku Pa-la-kuy katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu Pa-la-kuy makaala tu 2.1wang atu tusep a wang nu tademawan. sipakayda nu Pa-la-kuy tu pinatu a mihcaan nikalawlawan atu kalawpesan tu tademaw haymaw sa a masasa. . caysiwsipsep mihcaan a Ya-sun-sen 1940Âπ¥ÁöÑ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ Ya-sun-sen naw Ing-ti-an tademaw Kua-la-ni binacadan a niyadu'an, caylimtulim mihcaan u Pu-taw-ya tademaw ci Ya-li-he.Cya-si-ya ku makaadihay, caylimlupic mihcaan Si-pan-ya ku mikuwanay a patideng tu Ya-sun-sen-se. pangangan han nu Nan-mem-cuo u "wina nu tukay". caylimwalsep mihcaan malaNan-mem-la-pu-la-ta cungtu tatelungan nu tukayan. caywalcaycay mihcaan, misiteked ku Pa-la-kuy, malatukay ku Ya-sun-sen. kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy, debungan nu Pa-si, A-ken-tin,W-la-kuy tulu a kanatalan ku Ya-sun-sen, u Pa-si ku mikuwanay katukuh tu caywalpicnem mihcaan. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy kauyli sawacan, itida i Pi-ke-ma-ye-sawac atu Pa-la-kuy-sawac nu nikalalitemuhan a masaenalay nu kitidaan. saan namaka Ke-pen dimiad a nikakenihan, Ya-sun-sen u hinaudaday tu laludan diheku ku senged, caledes ku lalud, sapi' ku kasienawan, yadah ku udad tu mihcaan, u senged ku yadahay. Ya-sun-sen diheku ku demiad, caay henay kasisuleda, nika kasienawan a nikasisuledaan nasisuleda tu sa ku nikilukan, aydaay a nikasisuledaan a nikilukan i caypiclimcay mihcaan enem a buladan. 1751Âπ¥6Êúà.
S.PHON: == ja-sun-s…ôn *** == ja-sun-s…ôn " si-pan-ja kamu : asun ¶i*n, ≈ãiƒßa nu si-pan-ja :(asun î~ °sjon) u pa-r~…æa-kuj tukaj, tad…ômaw nu ƒß…ônin ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "tus…ôp ¶ajr~…æim miƒß ¶aan" itida i nan-wi **.*****, si- ¶in **.*****. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…æa-kuj sawa ¶ nu kawir~…æi sadipasan, u pa-r~…æa-kuj a a≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan nu minatu atu kakur~…æian, tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, kakur~…æian a≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan u kakan…ôn a kakakukur~…æian, atu tatat…ônunan a kakur~…æian atu tatabakuan a kakur~…æian. ***(****:asun ¶i*n,******:(asun î~ °sjon)) . ja-sun-s…ôn u ¶…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô î~ °, ¶aaj kaw nu ¶anan a ¶uoan. tabakiaj a tukajan u ta-ja-sun-s…ôn ƒßan. ja-sun-s…ôn patid…ô≈ãan i ¶ajr~…æimr~…æupi ¶ miƒß ¶aan war~…æu a bur~…æad ¶ajr~…æim d…ômiad, u nan-m…ôm- ¶uo sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…æikisian a tukajan, si pa≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo a " wina nu tukaj", tada≈ãa≈ãan naw nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…æa asun ¶i*n "tajda i tapukuan ni mar~…æija". ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimsiw miƒß ¶aan namaka pa-r~…æa-kuj kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan nanid…ôbu≈ãan nu pa-si ƒßitaj, katukuƒß i ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶r~…æim miƒß ¶aan pa-si ƒßitaj ƒßida satu a tar~…æuma î~ ° ku nuƒß…ôni. ",***nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…æa asun ¶i*n .**** . i≈ã- ¶u≈ã samian u mitudu≈ãan tu pa-r~…æi nu ƒßitajan nisaadidian a r~…æuma î~ °an, mi ¶apiaj u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ma ¶ian, ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp miƒß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiwwar~…æs…ôp miƒß ¶aan misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ tu w-r~…æu-kua-ja putaƒß, tastas…ô≈ã ku mar~…æumanaj a tukaj, ajda ja mar~…æumanaj map…ô ¶i î~ ° ƒß…ônaj, sakatar~…æawan sa tu r~…æabii. kapaƒß ku inakaan a r~…æuma î~ °an, u siidaaj nu pa-r~…æa-kuj ku mu…ôn…ô≈ãaj, idaw ku tabakiaj nu patijamaj, ¶a ¶akajan. ¶onm…ôbor~…æ a ƒßunbu itida i ja-sun-s…ôn ¶api nu r~…æu-k…ô î~ °. idaw ku nakamuan saan ja-sun-s…ôn u sakaj ƒß…ôkar~…æ a kanatar~…æan nu tajdaaj mida≈ã nu sajasujaj a tukajan. . ¶onm…ôbor~…æ . ja-sun-s…ôn itida i nan- ¶uj-ti- ¶un amisan nutipan kapur~…æu≈ãan nu i ¶iba ni kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan a kitidaan, mir~…æaad tu ta-si-j…ô≈ã ¶ajr~…æus…ôps…ôp kun-r~…æi, mir~…æaad tu taj-pin-j…ô≈ã ¶ajs…ôps…ôps…ôp kun-r~…æi. ir~…æabu nu ja-sun-s…ôn idaw ku sasi≈ã nu ¶u≈ã-ƒßua-min-kuo ¶…ôn- ¶u≈ã- ¶…ôn atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-s…ô dadan. . r~…æikisi** kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan nu pa-r~…æa-kuj "paraguajan war" si≈ãa≈ãan tu tur~…æu ka pur~…æu≈ãan a kar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw " war of tƒß…ô tripr~…æ…ô ar~…ær~…æian ¶…ô" , u ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimsip miƒß ¶aan katukuƒß ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶s…ôp miƒß ¶aan, pa-r~…æa-kuj atu tur~…æuaj a kanatar~…æan " a-k…ôn-t…ôn, pa-si-ti-kuo atu w-r~…æa-kuj" tunikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan. ujni u r~…æa-tin-m…ôm- ¶uo nu sakaj r~…æikisian u sakar~…æabad…ôsan, u sakatar~…æawan ni kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, maƒßiniaj a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan misuajaw tu pa-r~…æa-kuj tadamar~…æibar~…æu ¶u î~ °, tadamawada î~ ° ku tad…ômaw nu pa-r~…æa-kuj " ini i nika ¶i≈ãr~…æawan nu sur~…æitan, tat…ô≈ãaaj a nikapatajan ¶aaj ka tin…ô≈ã≈ãi", ina pa-r~…æa-kuj ar~…æ…ôs ƒßan tu nuƒß…ôni ku a-kin-tin atu pa-si a r~…æar~…æaan. nina ni kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan kar~…æi≈ãatuan i ¶ajwar~…æn…ômsip miƒß ¶aan tu ƒß…ôd…ôk, r~…æi≈ãatu ƒßan namakajda i w-r~…æa-kuj sa ma ¶ar~…æap ku pa-r~…æa-kuj atu pa-si nikar~…æawr~…æawan. ¶ajwar~…æn…ômr~…æim miƒß ¶aan, a-k…ôn-tin atu w-r~…æa-kuj mi ¶umud misuajaw tu pa-r~…æa-kuj a mir~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, sisa ninakar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan " tur~…æu a kanatar~…æ nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan". ". kad…ôm…ô ¶an ni kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan tu pa-r~…æa-kuj ƒßatida tu sa. pa-r~…æa-kuj tina kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan ƒßinad…ôm…ô ¶, mir~…æiƒßida tu miwawi…ôs, ujniƒßan tu u kar~…æabad…ôsan a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, sisa pa-r~…æa-kuj ƒßitaj atu binawr~…æan katuud ku mapatajaj i nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, mapat…ôr~…æuƒß atu im…ôr~…æa≈ã aibar~…æu ¶u î~ ° ƒßan tu. maƒßiniaj a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan matur~…æin tu sabaw s…ôpat a bur~…æad, katukuƒß i ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶s…ôp miƒß ¶aan tur~…æu a bur~…æad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, fuo-r~…æan-si-k…ô.suo-r~…æa-nuo.r~…æuo-pa…ô-s…ô ¶u≈ã-tun itida i saj-r~…æuo-kaw-r~…æa nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan pataj…ôn nu pa-si a ƒßitaj. a-k…ôn-tin atu pa-si ƒßitaj d…ôbu≈ãan ku pa-r~…æa-kuj katukuƒß i ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶r~…æim miƒß ¶aan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu pa-r~…æa-kuj makaar~…æa tu *.*wa≈ã atu tus…ôp a wa≈ã nu tad…ômawan. sipakajda nu pa-r~…æa-kuj tu pinatu a miƒß ¶aan nikar~…æawr~…æawan atu kar~…æawp…ôsan tu tad…ômaw ƒßajmaw sa a masasa. . ¶ajsiwsips…ôp miƒß ¶aan a ja-sun-s…ôn ********* ja-sun-s…ôn naw i≈ã-ti-an tad…ômaw kua-r~…æa-ni bina ¶adan a nijadu î~ °an, ¶ajr~…æimtur~…æim miƒß ¶aan u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw ¶i ja-r~…æi-ƒß…ô. ¶ja-si-ja ku makaadiƒßaj, ¶ajr~…æimr~…æupi ¶ miƒß ¶aan si-pan-ja ku mikuwanaj a patid…ô≈ã tu ja-sun-s…ôn-s…ô. pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan nu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo u "wina nu tukaj". ¶ajr~…æimwar~…æs…ôp miƒß ¶aan mar~…æanan-m…ôm-r~…æa-pu-r~…æa-ta ¶u≈ãtu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu tukajan. ¶ajwar~…æ ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, misit…ôk…ôd ku pa-r~…æa-kuj, mar~…æatukaj ku ja-sun-s…ôn. kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan nu pa-r~…æa-kuj, d…ôbu≈ãan nu pa-si, a-k…ôn-tin,w-r~…æa-kuj tur~…æu a kanatar~…æan ku ja-sun-s…ôn, u pa-si ku mikuwanaj katukuƒß tu ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶n…ôm miƒß ¶aan. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…æa-kuj kaujr~…æi sawa ¶an, itida i pi-k…ô-ma-j…ô-sawa ¶ atu pa-r~…æa-kuj-sawa ¶ nu nikar~…æar~…æit…ômuƒßan a masa…ônar~…æaj nu kitidaan. saan namaka k…ô-p…ôn dimiad a nikak…ôniƒßan, ja-sun-s…ôn u ƒßinaudadaj tu r~…æar~…æudan diƒß…ôku ku s…ô≈ã…ôd, ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs ku r~…æar~…æud, sapi î~ ° ku kasi…ônawan, jadaƒß ku udad tu miƒß ¶aan, u s…ô≈ã…ôd ku jadaƒßaj. ja-sun-s…ôn diƒß…ôku ku d…ômiad, ¶aaj ƒß…ônaj kasisur~…æ…ôda, nika kasi…ônawan a nikasisur~…æ…ôdaan nasisur~…æ…ôda tu sa ku nikir~…æukan, ajdaaj a nikasisur~…æ…ôdaan a nikir~…æukan i ¶ajpi ¶r~…æim ¶aj miƒß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…æadan. *******.
S.FORM: == Ya-sun-sen ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ == Ya-sun-sen " Si-pan-ya kamu : Asunci√≥n, ngiha nu Si-pan-ya :(asun'sjon) u Pa-la-kuy tukay, tademaw nu henin 525,252 ku tademaw "tusepcaylim mihcaan" itida i nan-wi 25.2667¬∞, si-cin 57.6667¬∞. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy sawac nu kawili sadipasan, u Pa-la-kuy a angangangan nu minatu atu kakulian, tatelungan nu lalangawan, kakulian angangangan u kakanen a kakakukulian, atu tatatenunan a kakulian atu tatabakuan a kakulian. ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ(Ë•øÁè≠ÁâôË™û:Asunci√≥n,Ë•øÁè≠ÁâôË™ûÁôºÈü≥:(asun'sjon)) . Ya-sun-sen u ce-ce-se', caay kaw nu canan a cuoan. tabakiay a tukayan u Ta-ya-sun-sen han. Ya-sun-sen patidengan i caylimlupic mihcaan walu a bulad caylim demiad, u Nan-mem-cuo satenesay nu likisian a tukayan, si pangangangan han tu Nan-mem-cuo a " wina nu tukay", tadangangan naw Nuestra Se√±ora de la Asunci√≥n "tayda i tapukuan ni Maliya". Caywallimsiw mihcaan namaka Pa-la-kuy kalepacawan nanidebungan nu Pa-si hitay, katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan Pa-si hitay hida satu a taluma' ku nuheni. ",ÂéüÂêçÁÇ∫Nuestra Se√±ora de la Asunci√≥n .1869 . Ing-cung samian u mitudungan tu Pa-li nu hitayan nisaadidian a luma'an, micapiay u tatelungan nu macian, caysiwpicsep mihcaan atu caysiwwalsep mihcaan misaahebal tu W-lu-kua-ya putah, tastaseng ku malumanay a tukay, ayda ya malumanay mapeci' henay, sakatalawan sa tu labii. kapah ku inakaan a luma'an, u siidaay nu Pa-la-kuy ku muenengay, idaw ku tabakiay nu patiyamay, cacakayan. CONMEBOL a hunbu itida i Ya-sun-sen capi nu Lu-ke'. idaw ku nakamuan saan Ya-sun-sen u sakay hekal a kanatalan nu taydaay midang nu sayasuyay a tukayan. .CONMEBOL . Ya-sun-sen itida i Nan-cuy-ti-cun amisan nutipan kapulungan nu iciba ni kalepacawan a kitidaan, milaad tu Ta-si-yeng caylusepsep kun-li, milaad tu Tay-pin-yeng caysepsepsep kun-li. ilabu nu Ya-sun-sen idaw ku sasing nu Cung-hua-min-kuo Cen-cung-cen atu Cen-ce-se dadan. . likisiÊ≠∑Âè≤ kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy "Paraguayan War" singangan tu tulu ka pulungan a kalepacaw " War of the Triple Alliance" , u caywallimsip mihcaan katukuh caywalpicsep mihcaan, Pa-la-kuy atu tuluay a kanatalan " A-ken-ten, Pa-si-ti-kuo atu W-la-kuy" tunikalepacawan. uyni u La-tin-mem-cuo nu sakay likisian u sakalabadesan, u sakatalawan ni kalepacawan, mahiniay a nikalepacawan misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy tadamalibalucu', tadamawada' ku tademaw nu Pa-la-kuy " ini i nikacinglawan nu sulitan, tatengaay a nikapatayan caay ka tinengngi", ina Pa-la-kuy ales han tu nuheni ku A-kin-tin atu Pa-si a lalaan. nina ni kalepacawan kalingatuan i caywalnemsip mihcaan tu hedek, lingatu han namakayda i W-la-kuy sa macalap ku Pa-la-kuy atu Pa-si nikalawlawan. caywalnemlim mihcaan, A-ken-tin atu W-la-kuy micumud misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy a milepacaw, sisa ninakalepacawan pangangan han " tulu a kanatal nikalepacawan". ". kademecan ni kalepacawan tu Pa-la-kuy hatida tu sa. Pa-la-kuy tina kalepacawan hinademec, milihida tu miwawies, uynihan tu u kalabadesan a nikalepacawan, sisa Pa-la-kuy hitay atu binawlan katuud ku mapatayay i nikalepacawan, mapateluh atu imelang aibalucu' han tu. mahiniay a nikalepacawan matulin tu sabaw sepat a bulad, katukuh i caywalpicsep mihcaan tulu a bulad cacay a demiad, Fuo-lan-si-ke.Suo-la-nuo.Luo-pae-se cung-tun itida i Say-luo-kaw-la nikalepacawan patayen nu Pa-si a hitay. A-ken-tin atu Pa-si hitay debungan ku Pa-la-kuy katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu Pa-la-kuy makaala tu 2.1wang atu tusep a wang nu tademawan. sipakayda nu Pa-la-kuy tu pinatu a mihcaan nikalawlawan atu kalawpesan tu tademaw haymaw sa a masasa. . caysiwsipsep mihcaan a Ya-sun-sen 1940Âπ¥ÁöÑ‰∫ûÊùæÊ£Æ Ya-sun-sen naw Ing-ti-an tademaw Kua-la-ni binacadan a niyadu'an, caylimtulim mihcaan u Pu-taw-ya tademaw ci Ya-li-he.Cya-si-ya ku makaadihay, caylimlupic mihcaan Si-pan-ya ku mikuwanay a patideng tu Ya-sun-sen-se. pangangan han nu Nan-mem-cuo u "wina nu tukay". caylimwalsep mihcaan malaNan-mem-la-pu-la-ta cungtu tatelungan nu tukayan. caywalcaycay mihcaan, misiteked ku Pa-la-kuy, malatukay ku Ya-sun-sen. kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy, debungan nu Pa-si, A-ken-tin,W-la-kuy tulu a kanatalan ku Ya-sun-sen, u Pa-si ku mikuwanay katukuh tu caywalpicnem mihcaan. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy kauyli sawacan, itida i Pi-ke-ma-ye-sawac atu Pa-la-kuy-sawac nu nikalalitemuhan a masaenalay nu kitidaan. saan namaka Ke-pen dimiad a nikakenihan, Ya-sun-sen u hinaudaday tu laludan diheku ku senged, caledes ku lalud, sapi' ku kasienawan, yadah ku udad tu mihcaan, u senged ku yadahay. Ya-sun-sen diheku ku demiad, caay henay kasisuleda, nika kasienawan a nikasisuledaan nasisuleda tu sa ku nikilukan, aydaay a nikasisuledaan a nikilukan i caypiclimcay mihcaan enem a buladan. 1751Âπ¥6Êúà.
S.PHON: == ja-sun-s…ôn *** == ja-sun-s…ôn " si-pan-ja kamu : asun ¶i*n, ≈ãiƒßa nu si-pan-ja :(asun î~ °sjon) u pa-r~…æa-kuj tukaj, tad…ômaw nu ƒß…ônin ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "tus…ôp ¶ajr~…æim miƒß ¶aan" itida i nan-wi **.*****, si- ¶in **.*****. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…æa-kuj sawa ¶ nu kawir~…æi sadipasan, u pa-r~…æa-kuj a a≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan nu minatu atu kakur~…æian, tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, kakur~…æian a≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan u kakan…ôn a kakakukur~…æian, atu tatat…ônunan a kakur~…æian atu tatabakuan a kakur~…æian. ***(****:asun ¶i*n,******:(asun î~ °sjon)) . ja-sun-s…ôn u ¶…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô î~ °, ¶aaj kaw nu ¶anan a ¶uoan. tabakiaj a tukajan u ta-ja-sun-s…ôn ƒßan. ja-sun-s…ôn patid…ô≈ãan i ¶ajr~…æimr~…æupi ¶ miƒß ¶aan war~…æu a bur~…æad ¶ajr~…æim d…ômiad, u nan-m…ôm- ¶uo sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…æikisian a tukajan, si pa≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo a " wina nu tukaj", tada≈ãa≈ãan naw nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…æa asun ¶i*n "tajda i tapukuan ni mar~…æija". ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimsiw miƒß ¶aan namaka pa-r~…æa-kuj kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan nanid…ôbu≈ãan nu pa-si ƒßitaj, katukuƒß i ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶r~…æim miƒß ¶aan pa-si ƒßitaj ƒßida satu a tar~…æuma î~ ° ku nuƒß…ôni. ",***nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…æa asun ¶i*n .**** . i≈ã- ¶u≈ã samian u mitudu≈ãan tu pa-r~…æi nu ƒßitajan nisaadidian a r~…æuma î~ °an, mi ¶apiaj u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ma ¶ian, ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp miƒß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiwwar~…æs…ôp miƒß ¶aan misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ tu w-r~…æu-kua-ja putaƒß, tastas…ô≈ã ku mar~…æumanaj a tukaj, ajda ja mar~…æumanaj map…ô ¶i î~ ° ƒß…ônaj, sakatar~…æawan sa tu r~…æabii. kapaƒß ku a kitidaan, mir~…æaad tu ta-si-j…ô≈ã ¶ajr~…æus…ôps…ôp kun-r~…æi, mir~…æaad tu taj-pin-j…ô≈ã ¶ajs…ôps…ôps…ôp kun-r~…æi. ir~…æabu nu ja-sun-s…ôn idaw ku sasi≈ã nu ¶u≈ã-ƒßua-min-kuo ¶…ôn- ¶u≈ã- ¶…ôn atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-s…ô dadan. . r~…æikisi** kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan nu pa-r~…æa-kuj "paraguajan war" si≈ãa≈ãan tu tur~…æu ka pur~…æu≈ãan a kar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw " war of tƒß…ô tripr~…æ…ô ar~…ær~…æian ¶…ô" , u ¶uo nu sakaj r~…æikisian u sakar~…æabad…ôsan, u sakatar~…æawan ni kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, maƒßiniaj a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan misuajaw tu pa-r~…æa-kuj tadamar~…æibar~…æu ¶u î~ °, tadamawada î~ ° ku tad…ômaw nu
